subcodes.first_line: O branch extended from the sacred and praiseworthy Tree, thou who art the blessed and firmly-rooted offshoot [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع النابت الممدود من الدوح المقدس المحمود الشجره المبارکه الثابته
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @Shrines and Holy places, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
